summary: Bug fix verified: Content List > Tek Tık Kurulum (Preset) error handling now works correctly. Errors display in preset error area instead of crashing UI with generic 'Bir hata oluştu' screen. Frontend normalizeErrorText/extractApiErrorText functions properly parse and display backend error responses including failed_countries details.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preset error handling verified working. AdminContentList.js has normalizeErrorText() and extractApiErrorText() helpers that properly parse backend errors. The three preset workflows tested: (1) install-standard-pack (2) verify-standard-pack (3) reset-and-seed-home-wireframe all handle ok=false responses gracefully without UI crashes.

empty_countries.error_displayed: En az bir ülke giriniz. Örn: TR,DE,FR

invalid_countries_XX_YY.error_displayed: Template pack kurulumu kısmi/başarısız tamamlandı | XX: operation_error | YY: operation_error

valid_countries.status_displayed: TR/DE/FR publish doğrulaması güncellendi. Hazır oran: 25%

bug_fix_confirmed.issue: Content List > Tek Tık Kurulum Başlat (Preset) was giving generic error screen
fix_details: normalizeErrorText() function parses various error formats (string, array, object with message/detail/code)
extractApiErrorText() extracts error from axios response.data.detail
summarizeFailedCountries() formats failed_countries array with country:reason pairs
ok=false response path in handleInstallStandardPack sets presetError state instead of crashing
